title: Function arguments by name: syntax error

features.name: named argument connection in function call
features.description: Code should include a function call using named argument connection syntax with dot-prefixed argument names
features.snippet:
function automatic logic [3:0] sum(logic [3:0] a, logic [3:0] b); return a + b; endfunction
my_y = sum(.a(my_a), .b(my_b));
